title: shell is a scenario step action, not a CLI command
desc: wkappbot shell does not exist as a standalone CLI command. shell is a YAML scenario step action. wkappbot shell --help shows the correct guidance via CommandHelpMap.
steps: Use shell as scenario step: {action: shell, params: {command: ...}}
Unknown commands with --help now fall through to TryPrintCommandHelp via switch fallback in Program.cs
Any unrecognized CLI command with --help now falls through to CommandHelpMap lookup in Program.cs
author: claude
